x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: VA channels determine where Now Assist conversational AI is deployed. Fewer channels means limited reach for Now Assist regardless of topic quality.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure VA channels via sys_cs_channel_list.do. Deploy across Employee Center, Microsoft Teams, and mobile at minimum. Each channel expands Now Assist VA self-service reach.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c26
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[VA channels determine where Now Assist conversational AI is deployed. Fewer channels means limited reach for Now Assist regardless of topic quality.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>VA Channel Configuration</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_channel');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active VA channels';

    if (count >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active VA channels. Now Assist conversational AI reaches employees across multiple deployment surfaces.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active VA channel(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist conversational AI reach is limited — deploy across Employee Center, Microsoft Teams, and mobile for maximum self-service coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active VA channels configured. Now Assist conversational AI has no deployment surface — users cannot access VA self-service.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005962</number>
<order>230</order>
<remediation_guidance>Configure VA channels via sys_cs_channel_list.do. Deploy across Employee Center, Microsoft Teams, and mobile at minimum. Each channel expands Now Assist VA self-service reach.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c26</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
